title: stelis vulpecula
intro: Stelis vulpecula, a species of orchid commonly known as the Fox Tail Orchid, is a terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis vulpecula include its potential antifungal and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal medicine, Stelis vulpecula is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
